message:
feat(runtime): add Computed<T> lazy derived values (bd-2my1.3)

Implement Computed<T> with lazy evaluation, dependency tracking via
Observable subscriptions, memoization, and version tracking. Supports
from_observable, from2, from3, and from_fn constructors. 16 unit tests
covering single/multi-dep, diamond dependencies, memoization, and
source-drop resilience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
